texto: The truly wealthy don't often pursue status. They don't need to. They have already made it. The pursuit of Rolex watches and $100,000 vehicles is for wannabes like you and me. Why pursue status when you've already achieved it?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Erik Wecks: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “The truly wealthy don't often pursue status. They don't need to. They have already made it. The p…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, personal-finance, values pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de values.
